name: Battle Mage : Card Caster
short_description: Battle Mage : Card Caster is a fantasy card-based adventure game. Immerse yourself in a world of magic and battles through story-driven mechanics and RPG elements. Master the arcane art to prevail. Make the right choices to know your true fate.
detailed_description:
Battle Mage : Card Caster plunges you into card-based battles and a branching storyline. Ponder the morality of your choices and impact the events around you. Build your arsenal of spells to prevail over your enemies and all those that threaten your advance.

Branching story

Take the path you wish to follow and change your destiny. Decide what you want to achieve and who you want to be. Your choices have consequences, good and bad, immediate and distant, blatant and subtle.

Card-based combat

Build your spell book to prevail over your enemies. Discover and acquire new spells along the way. Find your fighting style and walk the victorious path.
